who: procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 purchase orders/week
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/week, delayed approvals cause compliance issues. We provide tracking and weekly summaries instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Lack of visibility into purchase order approvals leading to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers

Community forums where procurement managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of purchase orders and summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
